document.name: bundle-proof
document.title: Bundle proof (fast verification)
document.summary: Minimal clone + single agent edit. Proves W3 local-build (no JuiceFS build), uid alignment (pod 10001), durable source-bundle persistence, and concurrency-safe parallel tool calls. No GAN plan/negotiate/refine loop.

intent.default: Add a small, focused input-validation improvement to the is-number library for edge cases (empty string, whitespace-only, hex like 0x1F, scientific notation like 1e3, Infinity) and a matching unit test. Do NOT change the public API or add dependencies.

with.command:
${ "set -e
cd /sandbox/work
rm -rf repo
REF=" + ((.trigger.repoRef // "") | @sh) + "
BF=""; [ -n "$REF" ] && BF="--branch $REF"
git clone --depth 1 --single-branch $BF https://x-access-token:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/" + (.trigger.repoUrl // "jonschlinkert/is-number") + ".git repo
cd /sandbox/work/repo
git config user.email agent@workflow-builder.local
git config user.name "workflow-builder agent"
echo CLONED $(git rev-parse HEAD) on $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)" }

agentConfig.name: bundle-proof builder
agentConfig.instructions: You make focused source edits inside /sandbox/work/repo. Read relevant files first, then write your changes. Do NOT run npm install / npm run build|check|test / npx vitest / tsc anywhere - the workspace is on a network filesystem where those are extremely slow and may fail; just WRITE the source files. Do NOT copy the repo elsewhere.

body.prompt: ${ "Task: " + (.trigger.intent // "make a small improvement") + "\n\nRepo: /sandbox/work/repo (read the source first). Make focused edits to satisfy the task, including a test. Remember: do NOT install/build/test in the workspace - just write source files." }

data.proof: bundle-proof complete; check Outputs for the source-bundle + diff artifacts
